---
name: ✨ Feature request (markdown)
about: Suggest a new capability, backend, or UX improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Before submitting:
- Search existing issues and discussions for similar requests.
- For broad questions ("what should we do about X?"), please start a Discussion instead.
-->

## Pre-flight checks

- [ ] I searched existing issues and discussions and didn't find a duplicate.

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the user-facing outcome first — what can't you do today, or what's painful? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should happen? Be as concrete as you can. -->

## Area of the project

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] new backend (Local)
- [ ] new backend (Cloud OSS / Replicate)
- [ ] new backend (API)
- [ ] script / LLM phase
- [ ] image phase
- [ ] video phase
- [ ] lipsync phase
- [ ] tts phase
- [ ] merge / ffmpeg
- [ ] UI (Streamlit sidebar / tabs)
- [ ] worker (FastAPI, memory management)
- [ ] tools (Merge / Watermark / Trim / YouTube)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] dev tooling / CI
- [ ] other

## Backend details (only if requesting a new backend)

- Tier: <!-- Local / Cloud OSS / API -->
- Model name:
- Provider:
- Required env vars:
- Supported dimensions / durations / params:
- Docs / model card link:

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you've tried or thought about, and why they fall short. -->

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to send a PR
- [ ] Maybe, with some guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links, references — anything else that helps. -->
